macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin drops below $62,000 as crypto selloff intensifies
items.summary: Bitcoin fell more than 3.5% in 24 hours to about $61,100, extending a sharp weekly decline and triggering roughly $594 million in long liquidations across crypto exchanges. The selloff also pressured crypto-related equities such as Coinbase and MicroStrategy.

items.title: Broad crypto market rout drives major liquidations and altcoin weakness
items.summary: A broader market move hit major cryptocurrencies, with reports of Bitcoin down over 4% and Ethereum down nearly 10% in 24 hours, while Cardano and Binance Coin also posted steep losses. Dogecoin fell below key support and was reported near a four-month low amid heavy selling.

items.title: Crypto liquidation wave wipes out about $1.8 billion in 24 hours
items.summary: Morningstar reported that a derivatives liquidation event accelerated the decline, with roughly $1.8 billion in crypto positions liquidated in a day, including more than $1.5 billion from long positions. The report also cited persistent spot bitcoin ETF outflows and regulatory uncertainty as headwinds.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta reportedly hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: A report says Meta has recruited Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren from OpenAI, underscoring the intensifying competition for top AI talent. The move highlights how aggressively major labs are still expanding their research teams.

items.title: OpenAI’s ChatGPT experiences user-reported downtime
items.summary: Users reported problems loading prompts in ChatGPT, indicating another recent reliability issue for one of the most widely used AI products. The incident adds to concerns about service stability as AI tools become more mission-critical.

items.title: Apple reportedly plans to open its underlying AI technology to developers
items.summary: Apple is said to be preparing broader developer access to its underlying AI technology, a sign it may be trying to accelerate ecosystem adoption. If confirmed, the move could reshape how third-party apps integrate Apple’s on-device and cloud AI features.

items.title: US-UAE AI data campus deal still not finalized, sources say
items.summary: Sources say the multi-billion-dollar AI data campus agreement between the US and the UAE remains far from finalized. The status of the deal matters because large-scale compute and infrastructure partnerships continue to be a key strategic battleground in AI.

items.title: Google posts a May 2026 recap of major AI announcements
items.summary: Google published a roundup of its biggest AI updates from May 2026, including announcements tied to Google I/O 2026, the Android Show, and Google Health. The recap suggests Google is continuing to push AI across consumer products, mobile, and health applications.

items.title: Mayo Clinic study says AI can identify brain tumor risks from routine slides
items.summary: Researchers reported that AI can analyze routine pathology slides to classify meningiomas and help predict recurrence risk without costly genetic testing. The work, published in The Lancet Digital Health, points to a practical clinical use case for machine learning in oncology.

items.title: New machine learning papers appear on arXiv
items.summary: The latest machine learning preprints include work such as 'Conformal Risk Sharing: Certified Cost Allocation with Participation Guarantees' and other fresh research uploads. These recent papers indicate continued rapid activity in statistical learning and probabilistic methods.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Summer Game Fest 2026 delivers major reveals, including Resident Evil Veronica remake, Cuphead 2 status, and new Sega spin-off
items.summary: IGN’s post-show coverage says Summer Game Fest 2026 produced several headline announcements, including a long-requested Resident Evil Veronica remake and new updates on Cuphead 2. The coverage also highlights new reveals such as Blood Message, Stranger Than Heaven, and the co-op survival shooter Hex.

items.title: PlayStation State of Play brings Nioh 3, Bloodstained: The Scarlet Engagement, and a new Marvel fighting game
items.summary: GameRant’s gaming roundup says Sony’s latest State of Play featured Nioh 3 from Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo, Bloodstained: The Scarlet Engagement from ArtPlay, and a new Marvel tag-fighting game from Arc System Works and Sony Interactive Entertainment.

items.title: Resident Evil: Code Veronica remake reportedly among the biggest SGF surprises
items.summary: A Summer Game Fest post-show discussion highlights Capcom’s reported unveiling of a Resident Evil Veronica remake as one of the event’s biggest moments. The same coverage also mentions other notable SGF items, including Blood Message and Stranger Than Heaven.

items.title: Gaming news roundup highlights upcoming PC releases, including Steam launches on June 6 and June 8
items.summary: A June 5 gaming news roundup notes several near-term PC releases, including The Airport Security Sucks, Solar Punk, Killer Bean, and Trials: Survivors on Steam. It also mentions free-game and playtest availability, including Tell Me Why on Steam and a limited-time Marathon playtest from Bungie.

items.title: Free Fire launches football-themed Fire Kickoff event
items.summary: A June 5 gaming news roundup says Free Fire is running its Fire Kickoff event from June 5 to 21, adding themed map changes, event modes, and related seasonal content. The roundup frames it as one of the mobile game’s notable live-service updates.

items.title: Nintendo Switch 2 sales in Japan reportedly decline after recent price increase
items.summary: The June 5 gaming news roundup says Switch 2 sales in Japan fell after a recent price increase, with weekly sales dropping sharply from prior levels. The report presents the slowdown as a notable industry development rather than a new hardware launch.

items.title: XDefiant producer says he is stepping away from the gaming industry
items.summary: GameRant reports that the executive producer tied to XDefiant says he is leaving gaming after the title’s shutdown following just one year. The story stands out as a notable personnel and industry-development item.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
